visual_description: In a dimly lit eatery, a heavyset man in a blue patterned shirt sits at a table, eating from a bowl with chopsticks while two men stand behind him near a chalkboard menu. A person in a dark jacket walks past the foreground, briefly obscuring the view, and then a man in a black jacket approaches the seated man from the right, leaning in. The seated man looks up while still holding his chopsticks.
audio_description: Ambient sounds are faint and indistinct.
